title: rosa × turbinata var. orbessanea
intro: Rosa × turbinata var. orbessanea is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rosa × turbinata hybrid, a cross between the Rosa glauca and Rosa rubiginosa species, and is characterized by its unique, orbicular leaf shape. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa × turbinata var. orbessanea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are typically used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
